description: A perfect stiletto that enhances your style, this sandal from catwalk blends perfectly with both, western and ethnic wear. Heel: 4.5" Upper Synthetic leather upper in a peep-toe design for durability and style Bow detail on the strap Synthetic leather covered footbed in ergonomic design for absolute comfort Branding embossed on the footbed Outsole TPU outsole with heels for lightweight comfort and style Textured heel cap for added comfort shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
